title: Mistral AI 的 "Le Chaton Fat" 成为本周 X 平台热门 meme
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
🚨 AI News | TestingCatalog
@testingcatalog
MISTRAL AI 🔥: Le Chaton Fat is now real 👀
A huge cat is being featured on the Vibe in both Chat and Work modes. Le Chaton Fat also wears a tie in Work Mode.
> "Le Chaton Fat" has become the most trending meme in AI this week on X, exploding on the expectation from Mistral to rel ade model.
> There is no evidence of such ambitions; however, @ EmmanuelMacron identifies Mistral as the only AI company in the EU capable of competing with US giants such as OpenAI and Anthropic.
Le Chaton Fat Vibes ❤️
Arthur Mensch
@arthurmensch
Jun 15
It's actually le gros chaton
1:53 PM · Jun 16, 2026 79.4K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Mistral AI 的 "Le Chaton Fat" 成为本周 X 平台热门 meme
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Mistral AI 在 Chat 和 Work 模式中展示了 "Le Chaton Fat"（法语"胖小猫"），Work 模式下它还戴着领带。该词已成为本周 X 平台上 AI 领域最流行的 meme，源于社区对 Mistral 发布超越 Mythos 等级模型的期待。尽管没有证据表明 Mistral 有此野心，法国总统 Emmanuel Macron 仍称 Mistral 是欧盟唯一能与 OpenAI、Anthropic 竞争的 AI 公司。另有用户指出实际应为 "le gros chaton"（大胖猫）。

key_excerpts.text: Mistral AI 在 Chat 和 Work 模式中展示了 "Le Chaton Fat"（法语"胖小猫"），Work 模式下它还戴着领带。该词已成为本周 X 平台上 AI 领域最流行的 meme，源于社区对 Mistral 发布超越 Mythos 等级模型的期待。尽管没有证据表明 Mistral 有此野心，法国总统 Emmanuel Macron 仍称 Mistral 是欧盟唯一能与 OpenAI、Anthropic 竞争的 AI 公司。另有用户指出实际应为 "le gros chaton"（大胖猫）。

Le Chaton Fat also wears a tie in Work Mode.
> "Le Chaton Fat" has become the most trending meme in AI this week on X, exploding on the expectation from Mistral to rel ade model.
> There is no evidence of such ambitions; however, @ EmmanuelMacron identifies Mistral as the only AI company in the EU capable of competing with US giants such as OpenAI and Anthropic.
Le Chaton Fat Vibes ❤️ Arthur Mensch @arthurmensch Jun 15 It's actually le gros chaton 1:53 PM · Jun 16, 2026 79.
